They protect coastlines from storms and erosion while providing food and income for millions of people. Rising ocean temperatures and acidification from carbon dioxide pose serious threats to reef ecosystems.

Summary:
carrier_text: Coral reefs support roughly a quarter of all marine species despite covering less than one percent of the ocean floor. They protect coastlines from storms and erosion while providing food and income for millions of people. Rising ocean temperatures and acidification from carbon dioxide pose serious threats to reef ecosystems.

This relationship was known to ancient civilizations but is named after the Greek mathematician Pythagoras. It remains one of the most widely used formulas in mathematics and engineering.

carrier_text: The Pythagorean theorem states that in a right triangle, the square of the hypotenuse equals the sum of the squares of the other two sides. This relationship was known to ancient civilizations but is named after the Greek mathematician Pythagoras. It remains one of the most widely used formulas in mathematics and engineering.

They protect coastlines from storms and erosion while providing food and income for millions of people.	
Rising ocean temperatures and acidification from carbon dioxide pose serious threats to reef ecosystems.	

Summary:

Coral reefs support roughly a quarter of all marine species despite covering less than one percent of the ocean floor. 
They protect coastlines from storms and erosion while providing food and income for millions of people.

Primes are also fundamental to modern cryptography, which secures online communications and transactions.

It remains one of the most widely used formulas in mathematics and engineering.
